calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Timothy Robles.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Karel Raba, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Timothy Robles.
Plaintiff's complaint for collections/common counts was filed on August 25, 2017, and personally served on defendant Timothy Robles on September 14, 2017.
August 7, 2018.
Default as to defendant Timothy Robles was entered on November 28, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant, Timothy Robles, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,347.14.
Costs - $696.96.
Total - $26,869.14.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
